utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: God , it is gonna so weird like when I come home and you are not here .

emotion_cause.span: 1_when I come home and you are not here .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: " You wanna go over to Joey and Chandler ? "

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Look , I am just gonna be across the hall , we can still do all the same stuff .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Yeah but we will not be able to like get up in the middle of the night and have those long talks about our feelings and the future .

emotion_cause.span: 7_we will not be able to like get up in the middle of the night and have those long talks about our feelings and the future .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Not once did we do that .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: So I , I told Rachel it was just gonna be the two of us .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh yeah ? Well , how would she take it ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Really well . Yeah . Surprisingly well . Yeah , she did not cry . She was not angry or sad .
